name: Lentil Shepherd's Pie
recipeIngredient: 10 oz. package frozen mixed vegetables (or 1 can of Veg-All, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Grease a round casserole dish.
3. In a saucepan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring until softened about 2 minutes.
4. Stir in the flour until absorbed. Add broth, thyme, salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring until mixture comes to a boil.
5. Stir in the cooked lentils and mixed vegetables and spoon into casserole dish.
6. Top with mashed potatoes, spreading evenly over top, leaving an air-hole in the middle. Alternatively, place potatoes in a large pastry bag fitted with a large star tip. Pipe the potatoes around the edge of the casserole dish.
7. Bake 40 minutes or until potatoes brown on top.
